Interior of a formal governor's office in Salem Oregon, present day. A woman in her mid-50s with short gray-streaked hair wearing a dark blazer sits at a large mahogany desk. A thick bound legislative document lies centered on the desk in front of her. Oregon and American flags stand in the corners behind her. Wood-paneled walls, tall windows with overcast daylight filtering through. The woman rests her hands on the desk and gazes at the document with a contemplative expression. Quiet, serious mood with cool natural light.
